schema_intent: Static sidecar fixture for one graph node, one chat answer, three citations, two claims, and one reviewer diagnostic.

safety_profile.notes: All identifiers, local notes, and people are fictional. Existing repo paths are referenced only as public-sample source labels.

graph_node.title: Public Sample Marketplace Offering
graph_node.summary: A fictional contributor proposes a public directory card for a training marketplace. The node is only used to test how answer support appears in a sidecar.
graph_node.authority_note: This node does not speak for any Nation, community, organization, or real participant.

chat_turn.question: What can be built first from this marketplace offering node?
chat_turn.answer_text: A safe first build is a static public-sample directory card with contributor-approved wording, a review-required display state, and a receipt that records what was shown. The answer should remain a build suggestion, not a claim of authority or consent.

source_documents.title: Indigenomics AI Graph Chat Witness Sidecar
Open Kit Collective Demo Sample Receipt
Fictional Facilitator Review Note
source_documents.public_summary: Fictional note says public display requires contributor wording approval and visible review state.

citation_links.supports_answer_span: static public-sample directory card with citation and review state
citation_links.claim_use: supports fixture shape, not real-world authority

citation_links.supports_answer_span: a receipt that records what was shown
contributor-approved wording and review-required display state
citation_links.claim_use: flags review boundary; raw source remains hidden

claims.claim_text: For this fictional node, a static public-sample directory card is the safest first build artifact.
limitations: Only applies to this fictional public-sample node.
Does not establish contributor approval for any real directory card.
Does not certify that the marketplace offering is legitimate or ready.

claims.claim_text: The cited answer remains a build suggestion and must not be presented as authority, consent, or verified truth.
limitations: A real implementation still needs reviewer signoff and display consent.
Citation presence only shows source relationship, not verification.

evidence_pointers.description: Spec names node, chat turn, answer text, citations, claims, evidence, witness records, review state, and AI-use receipt as sidecar inputs.
evidence_pointers.verification_limit: Shape evidence only; does not verify real participant content.

evidence_pointers.description: Public-sample receipt demonstrates a witness record structure that records what happened and what review state applies.
evidence_pointers.verification_limit: Pattern evidence only; sample receipt is not live proof.

evidence_pointers.description: Fictional local note marks public display as review-required before real use.
evidence_pointers.content_handling: public summary only; raw local note not displayed
evidence_pointers.verification_limit: Local-only source must be visible as local-only and cannot independently support authority claims.

witness_records.statement: AI assistance drafted a public-sample sidecar fixture from public specs and fictional local-note metadata. No private or protected source text was included.

non_blocking_flags.message: One source is local-only and must remain labeled as a public summary, not a displayed raw note.

acceptance_checks.criterion: Users can inspect which sources support an answer.
acceptance_checks.evidence: Three citation links map answer spans to source documents and source statuses.

acceptance_checks.criterion: Claims are separate from citations and can have their own review status.
acceptance_checks.evidence: Two claims carry independent review_status values and cite supporting evidence pointers.

acceptance_checks.criterion: Stale, missing, contested, or local-only sources are visible.
acceptance_checks.evidence: The fictional facilitator note is explicitly labeled local_only_public_summary and review_required_before_real_use.

acceptance_checks.criterion: AI-assisted answers include a receipt of source material and reviewer status.
acceptance_checks.evidence: ai_use_receipt and witness:graph-sidecar-ai-use-001 record inputs, excluded inputs, outputs, and reviewer status.

acceptance_checks.criterion: Protected source content does not leak through citations or summaries.
acceptance_checks.evidence: All source documents use public-sample paths, paraphrase-only labels, or local public summaries. No raw local note is exposed.

refusal_boundaries: Do not present chat answers as authoritative because they have citations.
Do not expose private source content in snippets.
Do not auto-upgrade a citation into a verified claim.
Do not hide contested, missing, stale, or local-only evidence.
Do not infer consent, legitimacy, cultural authority, or production readiness from this public-sample fixture.

follow_up_repair_tasks.title: Define redaction policy for real local graph notes before app integration.
Normalize claim review statuses across claims, receipts, and chat surfaces.
